subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! The veils cast by such of Thy servants as have disbelieved in Thy signs have come between Thee and Thy creation. How many [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی قد حالت بینک و بین خلقک سبحات عبادک الذین کفروا بایاتک کم من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @pain of love; love as veil, @nearness and remoteness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @living waters; water of life
